channel.title: Daily News (Personal Briefing)
channel.description: A personal morning news briefing covering AI, marketing, higher education, Canadian policy, BC local news, and global business.
channel.itunes:author: Daily News

item.title: Daily News for Wednesday, May 6, 2026
item.description: Today's briefing has two dominant threads that touch Midya's work directly. The collapse in Canadian international student enrolment — down 124,000 from the 2023-24 peak — is now backed by Statistics Canada data, and that's not background noise: it's an existential pressure on th...
